title: RunState
description: Session state and checkpoint for the Geas orchestrator. Written by orchestration-authority, read by restore-context hook for session recovery.

mission_id.description: Mission ID (e.g., 'mission-20260407-x7Kq9mPv') — used to locate spec and artifact files

mission.description: Human-readable mission statement from current mission spec

current_task_id.description: ID of the task currently being executed

completed_tasks.description: IDs of tasks that have been resolved

decisions.description: IDs of DecisionRecords created during the session

session_latest_path.description: Path to human-readable session summary for post-compact recovery

recovery_class.description: Recovery class from last session recovery. Null if clean session.

pending_evidence.description: Evidence files expected from the current agent

retry_count.description: Number of verify-fix iterations used for the current task

parallel_batch.description: Task IDs being executed in the current parallel batch. Null when running sequentially.

completed_in_batch.description: Task IDs resolved within the current parallel batch.

remaining_steps.description: Ordered list of pipeline steps still to complete. Pop from front after each step.

checkpoint_phase.description: Two-phase checkpoint state. 'pending' during write, 'committed' after.

checkpoint.description: Pipeline checkpoint for session recovery. Updated before every agent spawn.
